title: Ron Zabel profiled in Unicorns Journal on building Cryptool
content_html:
Cryptool CEO Ron Zabel is the subject of a new long-form interview in Unicorns Journal.

The piece traces Ron's path through traditional and decentralised finance, the inefficiencies in both that pushed him to start Cryptool, and the thinking behind a single platform that covers asset management and fund administration for retail and professional investors alike.

It is one of the more detailed accounts of the company so far. The full interview is on unicorns.club.
author: Cryptool
